name: Multiple documents, B2B SaaS context
description: Two documents covering company overview and customer profile. Inference should synthesize a coherent identity from both.

document_contents.content: Lattice is a developer productivity platform for engineering teams of 50+. We help engineering managers measure delivery velocity, identify bottlenecks, and run more effective standups. Founded 2022, 28 employees, HQ in Brooklyn. Bootstrapped to $4M ARR, profitable since Q3 2025.

Ideal customer profile: Series B+ B2B SaaS companies with 50-200 engineers, distributed teams, weekly release cadence. CTO or VP Eng is the buyer. Use cases: sprint health monitoring, on-call rotation analysis, retro facilitation. Pain points being solved: lack of objective signal on team performance, retros that stay surface-level, overburdened tech leads.
